entry.title: Application install and basis usage knowledge
entry.content: HEXOUsing HEXO to deploy blog. install Install12npm install -g hexo-cli # hexonpm install hexo-deployer-git --save # deploy to the remote. Usage Generate in the local 1hexo generate # or hexo g Show in the local 1hexo generate # hexo g Deploy in the remote 1hexo deploy # hexo d NOTE: this command should be executed in the blog file. Top posts install new index generate tool 12$ npm uninstall hexo-generator-index --save$ npm install hexo-generator-index-pin-top --save add top tag in the file 1234title: hexo+GitHubdate: 2017-09-08 12:00:25categories: top: true add top Logo in the website: open “/blog/themes/next/layout/_macro/post.swig” and find “<div class=”post-meta”>“, then add something like this. 123456<div class="post-meta"> {% if post.top %} <i class="fa fa-thumb-tack"></i> <font color=7D26CD>TOP</font> <span class="post-meta-divider">|</span> {% endif %} Add “recommend” link under in overview sidebar. Configure the “_config.yml”file. 1234567 # Blog rollslinks_icon: linklinks_title: Recommended# links_layout: blocklinks_layout: inlinelinks:Waiting Change: https://whitedlee.github.io/2021/02/21/Personal%20recordings/Install_and_basis_usage_knowledge/ Problem TypeError [ERR_INVALID_ARG_TYPE]: The “mode” argument must be integer. Received an instance of Object 12Reason: too much high version of Node.Solution: reinstall Node.js with version v12 Problem “Customize whether the text will jump to the content below “read more” after click “read more”” 1description: "just add description here" Problem “websites is different between the local and remote” Try to re-generate 12$ hexo clean$ hexo d -g Try to re-free the cache of browser by “ctrl+F5” Reference https://hexo.io/ https://www.jianshu.com/p/9f0e90cc32c2 dockerUsing docker to install enviroments and run some codings. we can find some images in docker hub. Basic operationsvolume “docker volume create”: create a volume 1docker volume create my-vol “docker volume ls”: show all volumes “docker volume inspect my-vol”: show the detail info. of volume my-vol. 123456789101112C:\Users\white>docker volume inspect my-vol[ { "CreatedAt": "2021-03-03T12:41:29Z", "Driver": "local", "Labels": {}, "Mountpoint": "/var/lib/docker/volumes/my-vol/_data", "Name": "my-vol", "Options": {}, "Scope": "local" }] “docker volume rm my-vol”: delete a volume. Docker compose Firstly, we need a “docker-compose.yml” file Then, excute “docker-compose up (-d)”, where “docker-compose up” means run the procedure based on “docker-compose.yml”, adding “-d” means running in the background. End the procedure by 1docker stop $(docker ps -a -q) QuantaxisQuantaxis is a tool to monitor stock. We can take communications with other through platform and find some instruction in documents. QAStrategyQAStrategy is a basic model of Quantaxis, which can deploy through docker. The instruction is here and here Download the “docker-compose.yml” file of Quantaxis Upgrade “docker-compose.yml” by “docker-compose pull” Establish the volumes 12docker volume create qamgdocker volume create qacode Run the QUANTAIS service by excuting “docker-compose up -d”. Open the 8888 port by “127.0.0.1:8888” to save stock_list. (password is “quanatxis”) click the terminal and type “bash”, “quantaxis”, “save stock_list” 12345bash (base) root@d5196673cbe0:/home# quantaxisjqdatasdk not installedyou are using non-interactive mdoel quantaxisQUANTAXIS> save stock_list restart the “qaweb” in the docker. Important ports 27017 mongodb 8888 jupyter 8010 quantaxis_webserver 81 quantaxis_community 61208 system monitoring 15672 qa-eventmq

entry.title: Private instructions of Markdown
entry.content: Basic operation Block 1234Method:<!-- ``` -->This is a block<!-- ``` --> Blockquote 123> you can add two spaces in the end to change lines. > this is blockquote>> this is secondary blockquote you can add two spaces in the end to change lines.this is blockquote this is secondary blockquote Size, fond, color of word123<font face="Times New Roman">This is Times New Roman</font> <font color=red>This is read</font><font size="1"> This is my text number1</font> This is Times New RomanThis is read This is my text number1 image123![drawing](./Personal_instruction_of_Markdown/TheMeansOFAdd&Commit.png)<img src="./Personal_instruction_of_Markdown/TheMeansOFAdd&Commit.png" width=".5/textwidth"> link1[This is a link](https://whitedlee.github.io/) This is a link

entry.title: Private instructions of Windows
entry.content: Windows Set utf-8 coding as the default coding in Win10: “按Win建->搜索’语言设置’->点击’管理语言设置’->点击’更改系统区域设置’->’Beta版…’打勾并确定”

entry.title: Private instructions of Linux operation
entry.content: Basic operations “pwd”: print current path; “ls- ah”: show hidden files; (use “ls –help” to find other related operations) “cat (concatenate)”: print content in the file; if the file doesn’t exist, the file with you typed in will be generated.

entry.title: Private instructions of Git
entry.content: Basic info. Download from “https://git-scm.com/“; Use it by Git Bash Open “Git->Git Bash”, then a window popped up; Log in your Github account by 12$ git config --global user.name "Your Name"$ git config --global user.email "email@example.com" Make one path as the repository that git can organize by 1$ git init Add a file (e.g. “readme.txt”) into the repository by 1$ git add readme.txt Then tell the git which change you did by 1$ git commit -m "wrote a read me file" Note: we can use “git –help” to find some instructions or “get help -commit” to find some detailed. Note: Git operations should be excuted in the repository path. use “git status” to check whether the files in this repository has been changed, for example 12345678$ git statusOn branch masterChanges not staged for commit: (use "git add <file>..." to update what will be committed) (use "git restore <file>..." to discard changes in working directory) modified: readme.txtno changes added to commit (use "git add" and/or "git commit -a") Show what changes have been done by “git diff” (from last add to now), for example: 1234567891011$git diff readme.txtdiff --git a/readme.txt b/readme.txtindex d8036c1..d55a7b6 100644--- a/readme.txt+++ b/readme.txt@@ -1,2 +1,4 @@ Git is a version control system.+Git is free software.+Git is a distributed version control system. Git is free software.\ No newline at end of file Show modify record by “git log”, which can show “Author”, “Date” and “uploaded commit words” 123456789101112131415161718$ git logcommit f32d6c294fc38c0feeb860ba7fd024e9179a5c3d (HEAD -> master)Author: WhiteDLee <White.D1.Lee@gmail.com>Date: Mon Feb 22 22:12:05 2021 +0800 add repeated wordscommit bc95568847ff2e3296d473b34670c21f1e523eb0Author: WhiteDLee <White.D1.Lee@gmail.com>Date: Mon Feb 22 22:08:43 2021 +0800 add distributedcommit 0d868ea57e13c48f4f5d4df593897ec8a038a513Author: WhiteDLee <White.D1.Lee@gmail.com>Date: Mon Feb 22 21:30:54 2021 +0800 wrote a read me file Back to previous version by “git reset –hard head~1”, where “head~n” means back to last n version. 12$ git reset --hard head~1HEAD is now at bc95568 add distributed If you want to back to one special version (even though the version you abandoned), you can use “git reset –hard f32d6”, where “f32d6” is the number of the version. 12$ git reset --hard f32d6HEAD is now at f32d6c2 add repeated words If you forget the version num, you can use “git reflog” to see all version num 123456$ git reflogf32d6c2 (HEAD -> master) HEAD@{0}: reset: moving to f32d6bc95568 HEAD@{1}: reset: moving to head~1f32d6c2 (HEAD -> master) HEAD@{2}: commit: add repeated wordsbc95568 HEAD@{3}: commit: add distributed0d868ea HEAD@{4}: commit (initial): wrote a read me file discard changes in working directory by using “git restore” delet files: “rm”: remove any files and can be used anywhere;“git rm”: remove the files in the Git workspace and stage, and only be used in Git workspace.“git rm –cached”: remove the files in the stage, and only be used in Git workspace. establish branch by “git checkout -b”, where “-b” means “establish and switch”; or you finish it step by step, “git branch” and “git checkout”; 12$ git checkout -b dev (git switch -c dev)Switched to a new branch 'dev' 123$ git branch dev$ git checkout/switch devSwitched to branch 'dev' show all branches and current pointed branch by “git branch” 123$git branch* dev main merge the branch with current branch. (at the same time, deleting the branch by “git merge –no-ff”) 12345$ git merge devUpdating dc46a9e..564e513Fast-forward readme.txt | 1 + 1 file changed, 1 insertion(+) delete branch 12$ git branch -d devDeleted branch dev (was 564e513). use “git stash” to store current working space; use “git stash list” to print all stored working space; use “git stash pop” to restore stored workspace. use “git cherry-pick” to copy special changes. Note: I am not very clear about this commend. we can use “git log –graph” to see the branch graph.1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132$ git log --graph* commit f2c4e7eee97b36d077f182393381ebbfa0f5f686 (HEAD -> main)|\ Merge: 79700e3 c25e138| | Author: WhiteDLee <White.D1.Lee@gmail.com>| | Date: Wed Feb 24 21:34:29 2021 +0800| || | merge dev| || * commit c25e1387f18caeea8e6005161476b691779e9bc5| | Author: WhiteDLee <White.D1.Lee@gmail.com>| | Date: Wed Feb 24 21:31:02 2021 +0800| || | delete one line| |* | commit 79700e392d76f968b35a623587df8fb036d1f50a|/ Author: WhiteDLee <White.D1.Lee@gmail.com>| Date: Wed Feb 24 21:32:01 2021 +0800|| add one line|* commit 564e513cb2d7a9820f40971c76e54a5685d82dba| Author: WhiteDLee <White.D1.Lee@gmail.com>| Date: Wed Feb 24 21:23:27 2021 +0800|| creat a branch|...skipping...* commit 0d868ea57e13c48f4f5d4df593897ec8a038a513 Author: WhiteDLee <White.D1.Lee@gmail.com> Date: Mon Feb 22 21:30:54 2021 +0800 wrote a read me file Note: we can use “git rebase” to comb branch graph log. tag. Actually, it is adding a point with “tag name” into certain “commit”. 123$ git tag v0.0$ git tag v0.9 f52c633$ git tag -d v0.0 ignore some special types of file, which will not be orgonized by “Git”. The method is downloading relative “.gitignore” file according to your demand in the link or establish your own ignore list (guiding by the link). Then add this file into the repository. configure alias and build Git server, please see the link Use it by “Git Gui” Show modify record: “Repository->Visualize master’s history”. Pull your code to GithubBuilding Connection with Github Generate SSH-Key as folowing. (omit it if you have SSH-Key) Then you will get two files, “id_rsa” and “id_rsa.pub”; Next, you will upload the public key, “id_rsa.pub”, to Github and use private key, “id_ rsa”, to log in remotely. 1$ ssh-keygen -t rsa -C "youremail@example.com" -b 2048 Upload the public key, “id_rsa.pub”, to the Github. 1Account->settings->SSH and GPG keys->New SSH key Build repository in Github and push local data into the Github. After build new repository, you will get the guide how to push your local data, like the following, which means push local version on main branch to the remote version on origin branch. 123$ git remote add origin https://github.com/WhiteDLee/Git.git$ git branch -M main$ git push -u origin main Note: in the last command, “-u” means push all data. In the future, you can upload updated data by using “git push origin main”. Build repository in Github and clone to the local. “$ git clone git@github.com: repository’s position”. 1$ git clone git@github.com:WhiteDLee/data-science-blogs Multiplayer cooperation; Since having no demand to use this, stopping here. You can study though this link Push and delet tag version on Github 1234$ git push origin v1.0$ git push origin --tags #push all tags$ git tag -d v0.9 #delete in the local$ git push origin :refs/tags/v0.9 # delete in the Github Knowledge of Git The relationship between workspace and repository and the meaning of command “add” and “commit”, and “restore”. After executing “git add”, “Git” will put your edited files into stage (like cache) from workspace; after excuting “git commit”, “Git” will put your edited files into master from stage, as following; after excuting “git restore”, the file in the stage will substitute the file in the workspace and the file in the master will substitute the file in the stage. Note: the version storaged in the master by “commit” is not the version in the workspace but in stage. Branch (useful for teamwork). Using a point to choose which branch you go. Reference https://www.liaoxuefeng.com/wiki/896043488029600

entry.title: 李宏毅-机器学习
entry.content: “李宏毅机器学习课程”学习笔记。 Part 0-1: Introduction of Machine Learning机器学习的简要工作原理机器学习的工作主要可以分为“training（or learning）” 和“Test”两个部分；其中“training”的目的是训练一个模型，而“Test”则是利用训练好的模型进行实际测试，以判断模型的优劣。具体工作模式如下图所示： “Training”从架构逻辑上来讲是构造一个模型，但从数学角度上来说仅仅是寻找一个函数(function)罢了，通过这个函数能够把输入的数据(图片、声音···)映射成一组向量，寻找合适的函数使得映射出的向量能够反映输入数据的属性，则完成了训练。例如：在二分类问题中：判别输入的图片是猫还是狗，数据进过函数映射后，得到的就是一个二维的向量$y_1,y_2$，其中$y_1$代表输入图片是猫的可能性，$y_2$代表输入图片是狗的可能性，很明显这组向量就能够反映我们的需求(猫狗鉴别)。“Test”则是利用训练好的函数对未知的数据进行测试(或者说应用)，将数据映射为向量，以实现数据属性的分辨。 假设我们有两组数据 $Set_1= \{ a_1, a_2, \ldots, a_M\}$ 和 $Set_2=\{ b_1, b_2, \ldots, b_N\}$ 分别作为训练集和测试集。 首先Training，我们的目的是寻找一个函数，所以首先构造一个function set $F=\{f_1, \ldots, f_N\}$ ($N$有可能趋于无穷大)，每一个元素$f_n$都能对输入数据进行映射，输出一组向量 $y_i=f_n\left( a_i \right)$；然而每一个function映射出来的效果不尽相同，机器必须得能够进行比较不同function的效果；并且由于function太多了，我们不可能一个一个的去比较哪个是最好的function，所以需要一个好的演算法加快寻找最优function的速度，记最优function为$f^*$。最后在利用function$f^*$在测试集上$Set_2$进行训练。 总的来说，构建机器学习模型主要分为三个部分： Define a set of function Goodness of function Pick the best function 机器学习的简要分类 从目标的角度而言，机器学习可以分为“回归模型”、“分类模型”、“结构模型”； 从function的性质来讲，机器学习可以分为“线性模型”和“非线性模型”； 而从对数据集的要求情况下，机器学习又可以分为“监督学习”、“半监督学习”、“转移学习”、“非监督学习”和“强化学习”。就分类问题而言，以上几类问题可以描述为： “监督学习”是指训练的数据都是有标签的，机器知道每一个数据的类别，如：训练的时候，输入一张狗的照片，机器知道这是狗。 “半监督学习”中大部分训练数据是没有标签的，机器只知道小部分数据的类别，这些没有标签的数据，机器也能够利用起来（这些没标签的数据都属于需要分别出来的类别中）。 “转移学习”中对于需要分类的数据中（测试集），在训练集中只有一小部分关于他们的数据，但是机器还知道大量的不相关数据的类别，机器同时也利用这些数据进行学习，已得到更好的分类效果。如：机器要进行猫猫狗狗分类，但带有标签的数据不多，但是却有很多关于人、花、树等标签的数据，机器同时对这些数据的学习也可以提高分类效果。 “非监督学习”中所有训练数据都是没有标签的，更多的是学习一种模式，比如：输入大量的动物图片，试图画出一张新的图片。 “强化学习”与监督学习相对比，监督学习是告诉机器怎么做是对的；而强化学习则是告诉机器，做的对还是错，让机器自己去反思为什么会有这样的结果。 part 0-2: Why we need to learn machine learning?在未来AI技术会取代很多工作，但是新的职业也同样会诞生，例如AI训练师。人工智能在现在依然有很多地方需要人工的力量，例如： 挑选合适的model和loss function 某些模型的最佳化比较难，如：深度学习 ML Lecture 1: Regression - Case Study在这一章节，将举例演示说明什么是“回归（Regression）” intro在生活中，我们经常会遇到回归问题，例如：炒股的时候，我们希望可以通过有关A公司的一些资料，推断出明天A公司股票的点数；或者对于现在比较热门的智能驾驶模型中，汽车需要通过各种传感器给他反馈的信息，推断出一个他下一时刻需要将方向盘打到什么角度；再或者通过用户的购买情况，推断出用户A购买商品B的可能性；等。所谓“回归”，就是利用已有的一些历史数据推测出未来某一变量的值。 Pockmon Test接下来，我们将以“pokemon”的进化情况为例，利用进化前的pokemon的CP(combat power)值来推测进化后的CP值。如 图2-1所示，他的属性为： 战斗值$x_{cp}$：14 类别$x_s$：Bulbasaur 生命值$x_{hp}$：10 体重$x_w$：11.62 身高$x_h$：0.88 我们的目标是找到一个函数，当将这些属性输入后能够得到进化后的CP值 数据源于： 根据上一章节的介绍，为实现机器学习，我们需要做：1），model:找到一个函数集合 ；2），评估函数的好坏；3）、找一个最好的函数。 Model我们先取一个简单的Function set（随意取的）：$y=b+w \cdot x_{cp}$，其中$b$和$w$可以取任意值，不同的$b$和$w$就可以构造出不同的函数。比如说：$$y=2+3\cdot x_{cp} \\y=1.5+8\cdot x_{cp} \\\cdots$$其中$x$就是特征(Featur)。或者考虑一个复杂的模型：$$y=b + \sum{w_ix_i}$$ Goodness of function如何评价一个函数是否好呢？ ———利用真实的数据集进行比对 假如我们有一些pockmon进化前的的CP值和进化后的CP值的数据$S=\{s_1,s_2,\ldots,s_n\}$，其中$s_i=\{x^i,\hat{y}^i\}$。通过将$x^i$输入到函数里面，得到一个预测数值$y^i=f\left(x^i\right)$，然后比较预测数值$y^i$和实际数值$\hat{y^i}$，就可以分析出该函数的好坏。最常规的做法是利用差值的平方和来表示：$$L(w,b)=\sum^{10}_{n=1}(\hat{y}^n-y^i)^2$$这个函数$L(w,b)$被称为损失函数。 Pick the best function我们的目标是选择一组最好的参数$(w,b)$使得损失函数最小，即所选择的函数与实际的数据最为匹配，用数学的表达方式为：$$(w,b) = arg \text{ } \mathop {\min }\limits_{w,b} L(w,b)$$ 一种很直观的方法是利用梯度下降法。所谓梯度下降法就是利用梯度寻找局部最优解，再通过反复迭代的方式找到全局最优解（不一定能做到）。假设损失函数只有一个未知参数的$w$，$w^* = arg \text{ } \mathop {\min }\limits_{w} L(w)$。 梯度下降法求最优的模型 随机选取一个初始点$w^0$；计算损失函数$L$在点$w^0$处的梯度$\frac{dL}{dw} \mid_{w=w^0}$，再沿着梯度下降的方向选择一个新的点 $w^1 = w^0 - \eta \cdot \frac{dL}{dw} \mid_{w=w^0}$，其中$\eta$ 被称为学习率；然后沿着梯度方向选择新的点$w^2 = w^1 - \eta \cdot \frac{dL}{dw} \mid_{w=w^0}$反复迭代······直到很接近为止。
